source_jobs.title: Research Scientist - Model Team
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.


About the Role

At Mirelo, you’ll work at the centre of how we build the next generation of multimodal video-to-audio models. This role is deeply hands-on and research-heavy: with a great H100/200-per-engineer ratio you explore and build new multimodal models and push the boundaries of what’s possible in music, sound, and speech generation. You’ll collaborate closely across research and engineering, run focused ablations, and translate experimental results into clear next steps for the team. From data curation to deployment, you’ll help shape the full lifecycle of the models that power our products and partnerships.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design, implement and train large-scale multimodal generative models for audio generation (diffusion and/or autoregressive models).

 - Explore new modeling ideas for audio generation (music, sound, speech) while taking inspiration from the language and image domains.

 - Develop and experiment with post-training for new capabilities (fine-grained control, in/out-painting, editing, …)

 - Conduct rigorous ablation studies, get actionable insights and communicate results to the team to discuss new research directions.

 - Contribute hands-on to all stages of model development including data curation, experimentation, evaluation, and deployment.


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - Hands-on experience in training large-scale generative models in a fast-paced research environment.

 - Deep understanding of cutting-edge methods and ML research in at least one of the domains: image, language, video or audio (specific audio experience not necessary, but nice to have).

 - Strong proficiency in PyTorch, transformer architectures, and the full ecosystem of modern deep learning.

 - Solid understanding of distributed training techniques—FSDP, low precision training, model parallelism

 - Strong track-record in working on generative models (publications in top-tier venues, open-source contributions or applied ML projects).


NICE TO HAVE

 - Proficiency with profiling, debugging, and optimizing single and multi-GPU operations using tools like Nsight or stack trace viewers.

 - Strong software engineering skills/experience in collaborating on large codebases that go beyond PhD research code.

 - Experience with generative models for audio (sound, music or speech) and audio codec design.




WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation that will transform how creators work and thrive.
   
   

We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of ethnic origin, gender, disability, religion or belief, age, or sexual orientation and identity.

source_jobs.title: Research Scientist - Audio Codec
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.

About the Role

At Mirelo, we’re pushing the limits of what generative audio can do, and our ability to innovate depends heavily on the quality of our underlying audio representations. In this role, you’ll work at the core of our modeling stack - designing, training, and evaluating neural audio codecs that directly shape the performance of our next-generation music and sound models. You’ll collaborate closely with the model team, experiment with both continuous and discrete representations, and build the evaluation tools that help us understand what actually moves the needle. Your work will sit at the foundation of building the best-sounding generative models in the world.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Develop and implement new neural audio codecs for sound, music and speech that push the state-of-the art in sound quality and are optimized for the the use case of generative models.

 - Think about the specific challenges that arise when the codec is primarily used as a latent representation in the context of generative audio models (in the end, the ultimate goal is to build the best audio generative models)

 - Explore the trade-offs of continuous (as typically used for diffusion models) vs. discrete audio representations (as typically used for autoregressive models).

 - Develop benchmarking pipelines for codec evaluation

 - Conduct initial experiments with generative models to verify that a new candidate codec is actually useful for our downstream tasks.


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - Strong background in deep learning for audio: neural codecs, source separation, speech models, or generative audio systems

 - Specific hands-on experience in designing and training neural audio codecs

 - Solid understanding of audio signal processing fundamentals

 - Strong track record (research and/or open-source) in the field of audio ML


NICE TO HAVE

 - Hands-on experience with generative audio models and good intuition of how the choice of the codec influences the training and performance of the generative model

 - Strong publication record (e.g., NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, Interspeech, ICASSP, WASPAA)
   


WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation that will transform how creators work and thrive.



We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of ethnic origin, gender, disability, religion or belief, age, or sexual orientation and identity.

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.



About the Role

At Mirelo, you’ll join a small, fast-moving team building real products on top of our generative audio models. This role is hands-on and high-ownership: you’ll ship end-to-end features across our stack, work directly with research and product, and help shape how our technology becomes something creators and partners actually use. As we scale our go-to-market efforts, the engineering work you do will sit at the heart of both user-facing products and deeper integrations with platforms, tools, and enterprise partners.



Key Responsibilities

 - Building and maintaining our products on top of our cutting-edge generative AI models for music and sound.

 - High degrees of ownership: you will be responsible for shipping end-to-end features across the front and back ends of our stack, as well as helping set the direction of the features and products you're working on.

 - Collaborate closely with our research teams and growth/sales teams and stay close to our users: spot practical opportunities, identify pain points, and turn them into actionable engineering tasks.

 - Work comfortably with our current tech stack: TypeScript, React, Tailwind, shadcn, and Convex as the backend.

 - Work with essential cloud services—primarily AWS Lambda and S3—for integrations, automation, and deployment workflows

 - Use modern AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, Claude Code, etc.) to move fast while keeping craftsmanship high.

 - Communicate clearly with teammates, jump into discussions, and help drive the technical direction together.

Ideal Candidate Profile

 - 5+ years of professional web development experience, preferably in fast-moving product or startup environments.

 - Strong expertise in TypeScript (both frontend and backend), React, Tailwind, component libraries.

 - Solid understanding of backend fundamentals: data modeling, migrations, performance, API design, security and data workflow.

 - Self-directed in a healthy way: you take ownership, move forward proactively, and keep the team in the loop.

Nice to Have

 - Basic understanding of machine learning and experience using ML/LLM tooling in products.

 - Hands-on experience with Convex, or similar serverless backend platforms, and the ability to quickly become productive with it. Proficiency in Python.

 - Exposure to AWS beyond Lambda/S3 (CloudFront, IAM basics, monitoring).

 - Experience contributing to or maintaining larger production codebases.




WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation that will transform how creators work and thrive.
   
   

We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of ethnic origin, gender, disability, religion or belief, age, or sexual orientation and identity.

source_jobs.title: Principal Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Your mission is to transform Mirelo's generative audio capabilities into a product creators genuinely love and return to again and again, helping define product-market fit through craft, iteration, and real user feedback.

As our first Product Design hire, you'll define how creators interact with AI-generated sound and shape the core experience of Mirelo's products. This is a hands-on, high-ownership role where you'll work directly with users and their data to turn raw AI capabilities into tools creators actually want to use. You'll iterate based on early user feedback and design intuitive, expressive interfaces for a new class of generative video-audio tools, translating complex model capabilities into simple, powerful user flows.

As the founding designer, you'll have outsized impact on how our technology becomes a real product for creators.

Key Responsibilities

 - Own the end-to-end UX/UI for Mirelo’s AI-powered creative products - from early concepts to polished, shipped features that delight users.

 - Translate powerful generative audio models into intuitive, creator-friendly interaction patterns and workflows. This is the core challenge.

 - Act as the critical link between raw AI capabilities and tangible creator value. Rapidly prototype and test concepts to ensure our tech meets genuine user needs.

 - Embed deeply with our early customers and product data. Gather qualitative feedback and quantitative insights to drive continuous, high-velocity design iteration.

 - Partner closely with product and engineering to define requirements, explore solutions, and ensure the high-quality, feasible implementation of your designs.

 - Build high-fidelity prototypes that communicate interaction ideas and explore novel, emergent behaviors driven by AI.

 - Establish foundational design principles, patterns, and lightweight systems that scale as the product and the entire AI-driven feature set evolves.


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - Multiple years of product design experience with a strong portfolio of end-to-end product work and high-craft interfaces.

 - Demonstrated ability to turn ambiguous, technical concepts - especially AI-driven functionality - into elegant, intuitive designs.

 - Data-informed design approach: comfortable using both qualitative and quantitative insights to guide decisions.

 - Passion for the creator ecosystem: you’ve experimented with video-gen or music-gen tools, are a creator yourself, or have meaningful industry exposure.

 - Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate closely with engineers, PMs, and research partners.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience designing creative tools, editors, DAWs, or other high-complexity interactive products.

 - Familiarity with generative AI UX patterns or AI assistant-style interfaces.

 - Experience contributing to or building early-stage design systems.
   


WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation

source_jobs.title: Principal Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Your mission is to help Mirelo find and scale product-market fit by deciding what to build, why to build it, and how to learn fastest from real creator usage.

You’ll be the driving force behind how our generative audio technology becomes a real product used by creators and partners. As our first product hire, this role truly is about 0-1. You’ll be deeply hands-on with high-ownership: shaping the product from the ground up, working side-by-side with research to turn foundational audio models into intuitive experiences, and features that creators love to use.

Key Responsibilities

 - As the first product management hire, you will define and execute the end-to-end product strategy and own the full roadmap for our product development.

 - You’ll be deeply hands-on: prototyping, testing, running experiments and iterating day to day yourself.

 - Work closely with our research teams to make our raw but powerful foundational audio models genuinely useful for our creators and users

 - Continuously monitor feature adoption and quality, iterating based on data-driven insights and user feedback, and design experiments to test new features

 - Coordinate work between developers and product designers

 - Although operating with a high degree of ambiguity, you’ll have to define clear product requirements and success metrics, and work with our engineers to implement scalable data analysis pipelines


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - Significant (5+ years) track record of product management experience with a strong understanding of our product space (generative AI/audio)

 - Proven 0-to-1 product building experience in a startup or fast-paced environment

 - Passionate about the creator world - you've played around with video-gen or music-gen tools, are an artist yourself, or have worked in the industry in some capacity

 - Hands-on approach: you use vibe coding to express and prototype your ideas


NICE TO HAVE

 - Technical background or software engineering experience
   


WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation that will transform how creators work and thrive.



We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of ethnic origin, gender, disability, religion or belief, age, or sexual orientation and identity.

source_jobs.title: Founder Associate
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.



ABOUT THE ROLE

As an early-stage startup, this role comes with exceptional breadth. While you’ll work on highly strategic and intellectually challenging topics, you may also take on very practical, hands-on operational tasks to relieve the founders (e.g. coordination, logistics). We’re therefore looking for someone ambitious, but also with a strong sense of ownership and a “nothing is below me” mindset.

Key Responsibilities

While your day-to-day will reflect the changing needs of the business, you'll generally focus on the following:

 - Support the CEO in allocating time to the highest-impact priorities while managing complex cross-functional scheduling and logistics that keep the team moving quickly.

 - Partner with the CEO to define team structure, support on hiring, and onboard new critical hires

 - Support in managing relationships with external stakeholders, including preparing for board meetings and investor updates - gathering data, crafting narratives, and designing presentation materials.

 - Support finance and administrative topics across the organization.

 - Jump into mission-critical, time-sensitive projects that require cross-functional coordination.

 - Support the founders in introducing lightweight processes that maintain structure as the team grows while keeping things agile.


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - You have gathered relevant experience in a demanding, fast-paced environment (e.g., consulting, finance, or an operating/BizOps role at an early-stage startup).

 - You are a proactive generalist who can seamlessly transition between multiple priorities.

 - You are hyper-organised and detail-oriented, with a proven ability to create structure and manage complex projects without close supervision.

 - You have a high degree of intellectual curiosity and are comfortable synthesizing data into clear narratives for executive audiences.

 - You are comfortable with financial concepts (budgeting, P&L tracking) and executive communications.

 - You default to action over endless planning and thrive in the ambiguity of hyper-growth startups.


NICE TO HAVE

 - A strong interest in AI/ML, creator tools, gaming, or the future of video/audio technology is a plus.
   


WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation that will transform how creators work and thrive.



We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of ethnic origin, gender, disability, religion or belief, age, or sexual orientation and identity.

source_jobs.title: Community and Creator Growth Manager
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.



About the Role

Our community of content creators is central to Mirelo's growth, and you'll be our first hire focused on this critical lever. This is a hands-on execution role: you will run day-to-day community operations and creator content and you’ll help us turn learnings into repeatable success. You'll be the voice of Mirelo - building relationships with creators, filmmakers, and game developers while designing the systems and programs that turn users into advocates.

As an early-stage startup, this role offers exceptional breadth and learning opportunities. You'll work on strategic initiatives with our core growth and product team while owning key workstreams that build and sustain our community.

This role is well suited to someone early in their career, or to someone already active in creator or community-driven spaces who wants to take full ownership in a professional, high-growth environment. We strongly prefer candidates who can join us at our Berlin HQ to work directly with the growth team.



What You'll Do

 - Community Operations - Own DMs and creator comms end-to-end across our primary channels (e.g. X, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, etc.). You're the voice of Mirelo.

 - Growth Execution - Run regular outreach and activation loops. Ideate strategies to grow and activate our user base. What excites people? Why do they return?

 - Build Systems - Create workflows, templates, and processes to scale community operations while maintaining authenticity.

 - Design Incentive Programs - Develop ambassador programs, creator spotlights, and loyalty initiatives to reward and engage our most active users.

 - Content Creation - Produce engaging content (posts, videos, user showcases) that keeps Mirelo at the forefront of AI video generation conversations.

 - Measure & Iterate - Track what drives engagement and retention, identify drop-offs, and continuously refine systems based on data and feedback.
   
   

About You

You're genuinely curious about AI and creativity. You're action-oriented, communicate clearly, and understand the platforms our users love.

 - Entrepreneurial generalist - Scrappy, independent, excited by variety. "Nothing is below me" attitude.

 - Platform native - Fluent in X, LinkedIn, Reddit, Discord. You understand platform culture and what resonates.

 - Organised and proactive - Juggle multiple workflows with urgency and attention to detail. You respond fast.

 - Action-oriented - Move quickly, experiment, and learn by doing rather than over-planning.

 - Experience-first - Proof matters: you’ve grown or run a community, channel, or creator program before (professionally or as a serious side project) and can point to outcome.
   
   

Nice to have

 - Basic content production skills (CapCut/Premiere, Figma)

 - Comfort doing live sessions

 - Strong interest in AI/ML, creator tools, gaming, or video technology
   
   

What this role is not:

 - A senior growth strategy or paid acquisition role - this is a hands-on individual contributor position.

 - A passive community moderation role - you’ll actively drive conversations, outreach, and activation.

 - A pure content or social media scheduling job - content exists to serve growth, learning, and retention.

 - A role with rigid playbooks or clear answers - you’ll be building systems from scratch in a fast-moving environment.
   
   

Why Join?

 - Join at a pivotal moment: We’ve s

source_jobs.title: Training Infrastructure Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mirelo AI is building the next generation of creative tools by generating realistic sound, speech and music from video.

We develop cutting-edge foundational generative AI models that "unmute" silent video content and create custom, hyper-realistic audio for gaming, video platforms, and creators. Our technology empowers global storytellers to transform their content.

We recently closed a $41 million Seed round co-led by Andreessen Horowitz and Index Ventures with participation from Atlantic, and are rapidly expanding across Product, Engineering, Go-to-Market, and Growth.

About the Role

In this role, you’ll focus on the full training stack - profiling GPU behavior, debugging training pipelines, improving throughput, choosing the right parallelism strategies, and designing the infrastructure that lets us train models efficiently at scale. You’ll work across cluster management, model training, efficient data pipelines for video and audio, inference and optimizing pytorch code. Your work will shape the foundation on which all of our generative models are built and iterated.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Find ideal training strategies (parallelism approaches, precision trade-offs) for a variety of model sizes and compute loads

 - Profile, debug, and optimize single and multi-GPU operations using tools like Nsight and stack trace viewers to understand what's actually happening at the hardware level

 - Analyze and improve the whole training pipeline from start to end (efficient data storage, data loading, distributed training, checkpoint/artifact saving, logging, …)

 - Set up scalable systems for experiment tracking, data/model versioning, experiment insights.

 - Design, deploy and maintain large-scale ML training clusters running SLURM for distributed workload orchestration


IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE

 - Familiarity with the latest and most effective techniques in optimizing training and inference workloads—not from reading papers, but from implementing them

 - Deep understanding of GPU memory hierarchy and computation capabilities—knowing what the hardware can do theoretically and what prevents us from achieving it

 - Experience optimizing for both memory-bound and compute-bound operations and understanding when each constraint matters

 - Expertise with efficient attention algorithms and their performance characteristics at different scales


NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience in implementing custom GPU kernels and integrating them into PyTorch.

 - Experience with diffusion and autoregressive models and understanding of their specific optimization challenges

 - Familiarity with high-performance storage solutions (VAST, blob storage) and understanding of their performance characteristics for ML workloads

 - Experience with managing SLURM clusters at scale




WHY JOIN?

 - Join at a pivotal moment. We've secured fresh funding and are gaining traction - now is when your contributions can make a real difference to our success.

 - True ownership from day one. You'll have genuine autonomy and responsibility. Your ideas and work will directly shape our product and company direction.

 - Competitive compensation and equity. We offer strong packages that ensure you share in the success you help create.

 - Build for the next generation of creators. Be part of the innovation that will transform how creators work and thrive.
   
   

We welcome applications from all individuals, regardless of ethnic origin, gender, disability, religion or belief, age, or sexual orientation and identity.

notes: Mirelo AI is a seed-stage startup with a strong focus on engineering and product development.
